apiNamedQueryParameters.description: Salesforce Account ID to fetch remaining schedule periods for

ApiNamedQuery.body2: SELECT Id, StartDate, EndDate, PlannedQuantity, ActualQuantity, ProposedPlannedQuantity, SalesAgreementProduct.Name, SalesAgreementProduct.SalesAgreementId, SalesAgreementProduct.AdherenceScore__c FROM SalesAgreementProductSchedule WHERE SalesAgreementProduct.SalesAgreement.AccountId = :accountid AND EndDate >= LAST_N_DAYS:120 ORDER BY StartDate
ApiNamedQuery.description: Recent and upcoming schedule periods for an account's Sales Agreement products, with planned vs actual vs proposed quantity, so consumption trend can be used to propose future quantities.
